history.text:
[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: The image shows a split-screen video call or livestream interface with two different people shown side by side on a smartphone screen.

Main Subject:
A split-screen view shows two people in separate frames, with their faces filling most of each half of the image. On the left, a close-up shows a person with short dark hair and a light-colored top, looking toward the camera with their mouth open. On the right, a close-up shows a person with long light-brown hair wearing a black sleeveless top and a necklace, looking directly at the camera with a neutral expression.

Setting:
The left frame shows an indoor setting with a curtain or fabric in the background. The right frame shows an indoor room with a light-colored wall, overhead lighting, and a wooden cabinet or dresser along the back. The overall image is displayed within a smartphone livestream UI screen.

Visual Details:
The screen has a black top area with user interface elements and a bottom area with navigation icons. The two video frames are separated by a vertical line and fill the central area of the screen. Lighting appears brighter on the right person’s face due to indoor overhead light. The right person’s black sleeveless top contrasts with their light skin and hair, and their necklace includes small metallic pieces that catch light. The left person’s face is closer to the camera, with noticeable blur or motion in parts of the image.

Practical Summary:
A smartphone screen displays a livestream-style interface with two people shown in split-screen video. Text and icons around the screen indicate the live status and navigation options, while the two faces appear in the central video area.

## Notes

- Beberapa elemen berupa ikon (mis. ikon pencarian, logo/ikon di tengah, dan ikon kotak masuk) tidak memiliki teks yang terbaca jelas selain label yang terlihat. Angka waktu “22.58” dan persentase sinyal/indikator baterai (“23%”) hanya ditangkap sebagai teks numerik.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
